protocol: ETH v2.33 Round 23 distinct intraday architectures
round22_holdout_policy: DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY; never used to choose or tune Round 23

architectures.idea: Continuation after a causal 1h pullback to EMA20 inside an established closed-4h trend.
architectures.neighbours: one-at-a-time nearest perturbations of regime threshold, pullback lookback, relative volume, stop multiple, reward:risk and max hold

architectures.idea: Breakout after fixed-threshold volatility/range compression followed by a wide-range volume expansion candle.
architectures.neighbours: one-at-a-time nearest perturbations of compression length/range, expansion range, volume, reward:risk and max hold

architectures.idea: Re-entry inside a fixed Bollinger envelope after an extreme in a closed-4h non-trending regime.
architectures.neighbours: one-at-a-time nearest perturbations of range score, ADX, Bollinger width, stop, reward:risk and max hold

architectures.idea: Strong closed-4h trend plus 1h directional acceleration, volume expansion and close near the candle extreme.
architectures.neighbours: one-at-a-time nearest perturbations of trend strength, momentum horizon/threshold, channel, volume, reward:risk and max hold

architectures.idea: Fresh 1h EMA9/EMA21 alignment and impulse break, confirmed by the already-closed 4h trend; not a Donchian family.
architectures.neighbours: one-at-a-time nearest perturbations of regime strength, cross age, impulse break/body, volume, reward:risk and max hold

candidate_policy: Each architecture and side is evaluated independently. Parameters are selected only inside purged training folds from a predeclared one-at-a-time neighbourhood. Round 22 holdout is excluded.
